title: Fruity Resource Pack
description: Replaces the Minecraft carrot texture with the FL Studio logo fruit.
body:
Fruity Resource Pack is a simple resource pack that replaces the texture of carrots, golden carrots and the carrot on a stick with vanilla-like textures of the fruit from the FL Studio logo.
\
\
\
![Carrot, golden carrot, and carrot on a stick shown all together in the inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd909b0094a6cebef4bcf71f7094836cfdd368bf.png)
